subject: english
description: will や be going to を使って未来の予定や意志を表します。

questions.question: I ___ games tomorrow. (play)
questions.explanation: 未来形には will + 動詞の原形を使います

questions.question: I ___ English next week. (study)
questions.explanation: 未来形には will + 動詞の原形を使います

questions.question: I ___ TV tonight. (watch)
questions.explanation: 未来形には will + 動詞の原形を使います

questions.question: She ___ music tomorrow. (like)
questions.explanation: 未来形には will + 動詞の原形を使います

questions.question: He ___ to school tomorrow. (walk)
questions.explanation: 未来形には will + 動詞の原形を使います

questions.question: They ___ tennis next Sunday. (play)
questions.explanation: 未来形には will + 動詞の原形を使います

questions.question: We ___ the movie next week. (watch)
questions.explanation: 未来形には will + 動詞の原形を使います

questions.question: I ___ hard next month. (study)
questions.explanation: 未来形には will + 動詞の原形を使います
